title: KitchenCraft Retro Café-Style Glass Sugar Dispenser, 7 x 7 x 13.5 cm (3" x 3" x 5.5")
features: Add a bit of cool café chic to your kitchen or turn your dining room into a diner by serving up sugar from this funky retro dispenser
Don't worry about overdoing it with the sweet stuff. The dispenser dishes out a teaspoon at a time. Great for diet and portion control!
Don't faff around with packets. Keep your sugar safe and fresh and pour straight from the dispenser to your mug. Brill for baking too!
Had enough of spilling sugar on the worktop every time you need a spoonful? This dispenser will keep things tidy - and less sticky too!
This sugar pourer measures 13.5 cm (5½") tall and holds 2 g (7 oz) of sugar. Dishwasher safe (without lid). 12 month guarantee
description: From the manufacturer The definitive kitchenware brand KitchenCraft is the definitive kitchenware brand, with more than 1,300 everyday kitchen essentials to help you cook, bake and decorate. KitchenCraft Vintage-Style Stainless Steel and Glass Sugar Pourer Your turn to make tea? This café-style sugar dispenser is sure to sweeten the deal It’s hard to beat the feeling that you get when you’re sitting in a café sipping on a cup of freshly brewed coffee. The hiss of the coffee machine, the smell of the freshly roasted beans and little touches, like sugar and napkin dispensers, all add to the atmosphere. Fortunately there’s a way that you can bring a splash of that magic to your own home. With this retro sugar pourer, you’ll feel like you’re treating yourself to an old-fashioned café experience on a daily basis! Made of high-quality glass and stainless steel, with vintage-style embossed details, this sugar dispenser is a great way to bring the classic café or diner vibe into your kitchen or dining room. And best of all, it won’t ever feel out of place because it’s really practical too. Fed up of faffing about with bags and packaging? Had enough of cleaning up the sticky spills that inevitably happen when you lift the spoon out of the bag? Want to have sugar on hand when you’re baking, or making large batches of tea? This dispenser is just what you need! Diameter: 7 cm (3 inches) Height: 13 cm (5½ inches) Capacity: 200 g (7 oz) of sugar Re-fillable Glass is dishwasher safe Lid is hand-wash only Key Features Retro café chic Turn your house in to a café with one simple serving tool. The embossed edges and metal pouring spout give a classic diner look that will make your friends and family feel extra special when they pop round for a cuppa. Great for popping on the table at big events too! Easy serve You can certainly have too much of a good thing and sugar fits the bill. Don’t worry about ending up with a mug full of the stuff – the sugar doser is designed to release one teaspoon-sized shot at a time. Stainless steel and glass Clear glass and stainless steel combo are a real fit for retro kitchens and dining rooms. They’re nice and practical too – the stainless steel won’t rust when you hand-wash it, and you can pop the glass in the dishwasher to clean it through. Neat and tidy Forget about trying to keep your open sugar packets somewhere where you can reach them but won’t risk spilling them. This dispenser will keep your sugar safe and fresh and is compact so it’s easy to store. What’s not to love? About KitchenCraft The definitive kitchenware brand. Since 1850, KitchenCraft has designed, manufactured and supplied thousands of cooking utensils, tools and gadgets, each playing an important role in the kitchens of customers across the UK. With more than 1,000 products to choose from, there’s always a KitchenCraft product you can rely on - from essentials for every day to the exceptional.
